_meta.instructions: Agents: Only change the 'passes' field. Do not modify descriptions, steps, or structure. When implementing a feature, work on a feature branch named feature/<id>-<short-name>.

features.description: User can connect to Canvas LMS by entering their institution domain and Personal Access Token. Connection is validated against Canvas API via Supabase proxy.
steps: Open the app and click Connect to Canvas
Enter a Canvas domain (e.g., canvas.instructure.com)
Enter a valid Personal Access Token
Click Test Connection and verify success message
Verify courses load after successful connection
Refresh the page and verify token persists from localStorage

features.description: After connecting, fetch all content types from a Canvas course: pages, assignments, announcements, discussions, and quizzes via the Supabase Edge Function proxy.
steps: Connect to Canvas and select a course
Trigger a scan and verify pages are fetched
Verify assignments are fetched
Verify announcements are fetched
Verify discussions are fetched
Verify quizzes are fetched
Verify module structure is fetched

features.description: courseScanner.ts orchestrates all five scanners sequentially: accessibility, usability, cvcOeiRubric, design, and link detection. All detected issues are returned as ScanIssue[] with standardsTags.
steps: Select a course and click Scan
Verify all five scanners run (check that issues from multiple categories appear)
Verify every returned issue has a non-empty standardsTags array
Verify every issue has required fields: id, type, category, severity, title, description
Verify issues are stored in scanResults state in App.tsx

features.description: LiveScanView shows real-time scanning progress with per-item status as each content item is scanned.
steps: Start a scan on a course with multiple content items
Verify LiveScanView component appears during scan
Verify individual content items show progress (scanning/complete status)
Verify scan completion triggers transition to results view

features.description: Scan results persist to localStorage keyed by courseId. Cached results load instantly when revisiting a previously scanned course. courseId=0 (All Courses) is excluded from writes.
steps: Scan a course and verify results appear
Navigate away from the course and return — verify cached results load without re-scanning
Verify localStorage key 'simplify_all_scan_results' contains data for the courseId
Verify courseId=0 never appears as a key in the cached results
Refresh the browser and verify scan results persist

features.description: User can toggle CVC-OEI, Quality Matters, and Peralta standards on/off. Filter applies globally across issues list, scan panel, and analytics views.
steps: Open Standards filter modal
Toggle off CVC-OEI and verify CVC-OEI-tagged issues disappear from the issues list
Toggle off QM and verify QM-tagged issues disappear
Toggle off Peralta and verify Peralta-tagged issues disappear
Re-enable all and verify all issues return
Verify filter state persists when switching views

features.description: accessibilityScanner detects images missing alt attribute or with empty alt on non-decorative images. Maps to CVC-OEI D7 / WCAG 1.1.1.
steps: Scan a course containing images without alt text
Verify issues are created with type 'missing-alt-text'
Verify each issue has elementHtml containing the img tag
Verify standardsTags include 'cvc-oei:D7'
Verify severity is 'high'
Verify images with meaningful alt text are NOT flagged

features.description: accessibilityScanner detects skipped heading levels, missing H1, and bold text used as pseudo-headings. Maps to CVC-OEI D1.
steps: Scan a course with pages that skip heading levels (e.g., H2 to H4)
Verify heading hierarchy issues are detected
Verify bold-as-heading patterns are flagged
Verify standardsTags include 'cvc-oei:D1'
Verify pages with correct heading hierarchy are NOT flagged

features.description: accessibilityScanner detects data tables without th elements in the first row. Maps to CVC-OEI D4.
steps: Scan a course with tables that use td instead of th for headers
Verify table header issues are created
Verify standardsTags include 'cvc-oei:D4'
Verify tables with proper th headers are NOT flagged

features.description: accessibilityScanner detects data tables without a caption element. Maps to CVC-OEI D4.
steps: Scan a course with tables missing caption elements
Verify table caption issues are created
Verify standardsTags include 'cvc-oei:D4'
Verify tables with caption elements are NOT flagged

features.description: accessibilityScanner detects text with color contrast below WCAG 2.1 AA standard (4.5:1 ratio). Checks inline styles and data-mce-style. Walks ancestor chain for background color.
steps: Scan a course with low-contrast text (e.g., light gray on white)
Verify contrast issues are created with textColor and backgroundColor fields
Verify the contrast ratio is calculated correctly
Verify standardsTags include 'cvc-oei:D5'
Verify text with sufficient contrast is NOT flagged

features.description: linkDetector flags non-descriptive link text ('click here', 'read more', etc.) and raw URLs used as link display text (>50 chars). Maps to CVC-OEI D3.
steps: Scan a course with links that say 'click here' or 'read more'
Verify unclear link text issues are created
Scan a course with raw URLs as link text
Verify raw URL link issues are created
Verify standardsTags include 'cvc-oei:D3'
Verify links with descriptive text are NOT flagged

features.description: usabilityScanner checks for YouTube videos without cc_load_policy parameter. Maps to CVC-OEI D12. Partial coverage — does not check non-YouTube video sources.
steps: Scan a course with YouTube embeds lacking cc_load_policy
Verify caption issues are created
Verify standardsTags include 'cvc-oei:D12'
Verify YouTube embeds WITH cc_load_policy are NOT flagged

features.description: Detect when color is used as the only means of conveying information (e.g., red text for important items with no other indicator). Maps to CVC-OEI D6. May be implemented as manual-check prompt.
steps: Scan a course with color-only information patterns
Verify a flag or manual-check prompt is generated
Verify standardsTags include 'cvc-oei:D6'

features.description: Detect audio and video elements with autoplay attribute. Maps to CVC-OEI D16.
steps: Scan a course with audio/video elements that have autoplay attribute
Verify autoplay issues are created
Verify standardsTags include 'cvc-oei:D16'
Verify media elements without autoplay are NOT flagged

features.description: Detect whether modules contain learning objectives pages. AI generation available for missing objectives.
steps: Scan a course where some modules lack learning objectives
Verify objectives-related issues are created for modules without objectives
Verify standardsTags include 'cvc-oei:A1' or 'cvc-oei:A2'
Verify modules that have objectives are NOT flagged

features.description: Detect whether course content is organized into distinct units/modules with appropriate depth.
steps: Scan a course with flat or poorly organized module structure
Verify organization issues are flagged
Verify standardsTags include 'cvc-oei:A5'

features.description: cvcOeiRubricScanner checks for instructor contact information patterns in course content.
steps: Scan a course without visible instructor contact info
Verify contact info issue is flagged
Verify standardsTags include 'cvc-oei:B3'

features.description: User can stage a fix which generates the fixed HTML locally and sets issue status to 'staged'. No changes are sent to Canvas until publish.
steps: Open an issue in IssueDetailModal
Apply a fix (e.g., add alt text to an image)
Verify the issue status changes to 'staged'
Verify no Canvas API call is made during staging
Verify the staged fix appears in the Before/After preview

features.description: Side-by-side comparison showing original HTML vs. fixed HTML before publishing. Available in IssueDetailModal and FixPreviewModal.
steps: Stage a fix for any issue type
Verify Before/After preview shows original content on one side
Verify the fixed content appears on the other side
Verify HTML rendering is accurate (not raw HTML)

features.description: User confirms a staged fix, which sends the fixed HTML to Canvas via Supabase proxy. Issue status changes to 'published'.
steps: Stage a fix and confirm publish
Verify the fix is sent to Canvas via Supabase proxy
Verify the issue status changes to 'published'
Verify the content is updated in Canvas (check via Canvas LMS)

features.description: User can revert a published fix back to the original content. originalContent is stored during staging for this purpose.
steps: Publish a fix for an issue
Click undo/revert on the published issue
Verify original content is restored in Canvas
Verify issue status reverts appropriately

features.description: User can stage all auto-fixable issues at once via batchStageFixes() in fixStaging.ts.
steps: Have multiple auto-fixable issues in scan results
Click batch stage button
Verify all auto-fixable issues change status to 'staged'
Verify non-auto-fixable issues remain 'pending'

features.description: User can publish all staged fixes at once. Currently lacks per-item progress feedback during the publish process.
steps: Stage multiple fixes using batch stage
Click batch publish
Verify confirmation dialog appears
Verify all staged fixes are published to Canvas
Verify per-item progress is shown during publish (which item is being processed)
Verify success/failure status per item is displayed after completion

features.description: A confirmation modal appears before publishing fixes. Includes a 'Don't show this again' checkbox that persists to localStorage.
steps: Attempt to publish a fix
Verify confirmation modal appears
Check 'Don't show this again' checkbox and confirm
Attempt another publish and verify modal is skipped
Clear localStorage and verify modal reappears

features.description: User can manually enter alt text for images flagged as missing alt text. Fix is staged and can be published.
steps: Open a missing-alt-text issue in IssueDetailModal
Enter custom alt text in the input field
Stage the fix and verify the alt attribute is added in the preview
Publish and verify the image alt text is updated in Canvas

features.description: GPT-4o Vision analyzes the actual image and suggests alt text. User can edit before publishing.
steps: Open a missing-alt-text issue in IssueDetailModal
Click the AI suggestion button
Verify AI-generated alt text appears (may take a few seconds)
Verify user can edit the suggestion before staging
Stage and publish the fix

features.description: Fix heading level reassignment or conversion of headings to paragraph tags for heading hierarchy violations.
steps: Open a heading hierarchy issue
Select the correct heading level or convert to paragraph
Verify the Before/After preview shows the corrected hierarchy
Publish the fix and verify heading is updated in Canvas

features.description: Convert first-row td elements to th elements for tables missing proper headers.
steps: Open a table-missing-headers issue
Apply the table headers fix
Verify preview shows td elements converted to th in first row
Publish and verify table headers are updated in Canvas

features.feature: Table Caption Fix — Manual and AI
features.description: Add a caption to data tables. User can enter manually or use AI-generated caption suggestion.
steps: Open a table-missing-caption issue
Enter a manual caption and verify preview shows caption element added
Alternatively, click AI suggestion and verify caption is generated
Verify user can edit AI suggestion before staging
Publish and verify caption is added in Canvas

features.description: Override text color with a WCAG-passing color via inline style. suggestedFix format is raw CSS 'color:#xxxxxx' parsed with regex.
steps: Open a color contrast issue
Verify suggested color meets 4.5:1 contrast ratio
Apply the contrast fix
Verify preview shows updated text color
Verify raw CSS string is NOT shown to user (parsed and displayed as color swatch)
Publish and verify color is updated in Canvas

features.feature: Link Text Fix — Manual and AI
features.description: Replace unclear link text with descriptive text. User can enter manually or use AI-generated suggestion.
steps: Open an unclear-link-text issue
Enter manual descriptive link text and verify preview
Alternatively, click AI suggestion and verify descriptive text is generated
Verify user can edit AI suggestion before staging
Publish and verify link text is updated in Canvas

features.description: Generate Bloom's taxonomy-aligned learning objectives for modules. Inject objectives into module overview page via Canvas API.
steps: Open a missing-objectives issue
Click generate objectives button
Verify AI generates Bloom's taxonomy-aligned objectives
Verify objectives display with Bloom's level badges (tiny colored pills)
Verify user can edit objectives before staging
Publish and verify objectives page is created/updated in Canvas module

features.description: AI-powered rewrite suggestion for paragraphs flagged as too long (>600 words). User reviews and edits before publishing.
steps: Scan a course with a page containing a paragraph over 600 words
Verify a dense-paragraph issue is created
Open the issue and click AI rewrite suggestion
Verify AI generates a shorter, chunked version of the content
Verify user can edit the rewrite before staging
Publish and verify content is updated in Canvas

features.description: Tables used for layout (not data) should have a purpose-selection step (list, nav, gallery, side-by-side, spacing, data) before generating the semantic HTML replacement.
steps: Scan a course with tables used for layout purposes
Verify layout table issues are detected and flagged
Open the issue and verify a purpose-selection UI appears
Select a purpose (e.g., 'list of items') and verify appropriate semantic HTML is generated
Verify Before/After preview shows table replaced with semantic markup
Publish and verify conversion in Canvas

features.description: For broken links detected by linkDetector, suggest replacement URL and descriptive link text via AI.
steps: Scan a course with broken links
Verify broken link issues are detected
Open the issue and click AI replacement suggestion
Verify AI suggests a replacement URL and descriptive link text
Verify user can edit both URL and text before staging
Publish and verify link is updated in Canvas

features.description: Display an overall compliance score as a weighted average across all detected issues. Scoring: high=-10, medium=-5, low=-2 from base 100, floor at 0.
steps: Scan a course and navigate to Analytics tab
Verify an overall compliance score is displayed
Verify score decreases when issues are present
Verify score increases after fixing issues
Verify score never goes below 0

features.description: Show separate compliance percentages for CVC-OEI, Quality Matters, and Peralta standards. Fixed: now shows penalty-based compliance percentages with color coding.
steps: Scan a course with issues tagged to multiple standards
Navigate to Analytics tab
Verify CVC-OEI compliance percentage is greater than 0% (not stuck at 0)
Verify Quality Matters compliance percentage is greater than 0%
Verify Peralta compliance percentage is greater than 0%
Verify percentages change when standards filter toggles are changed
Verify percentages match the actual ratio of resolved vs total issues per standard

features.description: Display a chart showing the count of high, medium, and low severity issues.
steps: Scan a course and navigate to Analytics tab
Verify severity distribution chart displays
Verify high, medium, and low counts match actual issue counts
Verify chart updates after fixing issues

features.description: ComplianceReports.tsx displays a formatted compliance report with standards grid and critical issues list.
steps: Scan a course and navigate to Compliance Reports
Verify the report displays with standards compliance grid
Verify critical (high severity) issues are listed
Verify the report reflects current scan data

features.description: Export the compliance report as a downloadable PDF document. Fixed: uses jsPDF for direct programmatic PDF download.
steps: Navigate to Compliance Reports with scan data loaded
Click the PDF export button
Verify a PDF file downloads to the user's machine
Open the PDF and verify it contains the report content
Verify the PDF includes the standards grid and critical issues
Verify the PDF is properly formatted and readable

features.description: Generate a leadership brief summary of compliance status. Text generation works but PDF export of the brief is broken.
steps: Navigate to Compliance Reports
Click generate leadership brief
Verify brief text is generated summarizing compliance status
Verify brief can be exported (once PDF export is fixed)

features.description: Upload an IMSCC course package, parse it with JSZip, and store in Supabase for scanning.
steps: Click Import Course and select an IMSCC file
Verify the file uploads and parsing begins
Verify course content is extracted from the package
Verify the imported course appears in the course list
Verify imported course can be selected and scanned

features.description: Interface for creating courses from predefined templates. CourseBuilders.tsx provides template selection and CourseTemplates.tsx defines available templates.
steps: Navigate to Builders tab
View available course templates
Select a template and preview its structure
Create a course from the template (if Canvas connected)

features.description: AI generates content templates via the /generate-template endpoint on the Supabase Edge Function.
steps: Navigate to Builders tab
Request an AI-generated template
Verify AI returns a content template
Verify user can preview and edit the template

features.description: During batch publish, show per-item progress indicating which fix is being processed and whether each succeeded or failed.
steps: Batch publish multiple staged fixes
Verify a progress indicator shows which item is currently being published
Verify each item shows success or failure status after processing
Verify a summary is shown after all items complete

features.description: When a scan fails partway (network error, rate limit), display a visible error state with retry option instead of silent failure.
steps: Trigger a scan that encounters a network error
Verify an error message is displayed to the user (not silent)
Verify a retry button is available
Click retry and verify the scan resumes or restarts

features.feature: Modal UI Consistency Across Flag Types
features.description: All issue type modals (alt text, contrast, table, video caption, link text, objectives) should follow consistent card styling: border-[#d2d2d7] rounded-[10px] bg-white, heading outside container with icon.
steps: Open an alt text issue modal — verify card style matches design system
Open a contrast issue modal — verify consistent styling
Open a table issue modal — verify consistent styling
Open a link text issue modal — verify consistent styling
Open an objectives issue modal — verify consistent styling
Verify all modals use the same heading/icon/card pattern

features.description: First-run walkthrough tour introduces new users to the app's key features. OnboardingTour.tsx component.
steps: Clear localStorage and open the app (simulate first visit)
Verify onboarding tour launches automatically
Step through each tour highlight
Verify tour can be dismissed
Verify tour does not reappear on subsequent visits
